name: Vanilla Bean Dream
description: Classic vanilla ice cream made with real vanilla bean specks and a smooth custard base.
ingredients: Milk, cream, sugar, egg yolks, vanilla bean
featured_note: A dependable best-seller that pairs with every topping.

name: Chocolate Fudge Swirl
description: Rich chocolate ice cream with ribbons of fudge throughout every scoop.
ingredients: Milk, cream, cocoa, sugar, fudge sauce
featured_note: Great for customers who want something rich and bold.

name: Strawberry Sunshine
description: Sweet strawberry ice cream blended with pieces of real berries.
ingredients: Milk, cream, sugar, strawberries, lemon juice
featured_note: Bright, fresh, and popular on warm days.

name: Mint Chip Chill
description: Cool mint ice cream mixed with crunchy chocolate chips.
ingredients: Milk, cream, sugar, mint extract, chocolate chips
featured_note: Refreshing with a little chocolate crunch.

name: Cookie Dough Crunch
description: Vanilla ice cream packed with cookie dough bites and chocolate chips.
ingredients: Milk, cream, sugar, cookie dough, chocolate chips
featured_note: A premium flavor for serious cookie dough fans.

name: Salted Caramel Scoop
description: Creamy caramel ice cream balanced with a light salty finish.
ingredients: Milk, cream, sugar, caramel, sea salt
featured_note: Sweet and salty with a smooth finish.

name: Mango Sorbet Splash
description: Dairy-free mango sorbet with a clean tropical flavor.
ingredients: Mango puree, water, sugar, lime juice
featured_note: A lighter choice for dairy-free customers.

name: Coffee Toffee Crunch
description: Coffee ice cream with buttery toffee pieces and chocolate flakes.
ingredients: Milk, cream, sugar, coffee, toffee, chocolate
featured_note: A more grown-up flavor with a strong coffee note.
